channel.title: Nextjs on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Nextjs on Arrans github.io

item.title: lingdojo/kana-dojo
item.description: Aesthetic, minimalist platform for learning Japanese inspired by Duolingo and Monkeytype, built with Next.js and sponsored by Vercel. Beginner-friendly with plenty of good first issues - all contributions are welcome!

item.title: Dokploy/dokploy
item.description: Open Source Alternative to Vercel, Netlify and Heroku.

item.title: f/prompts.chat
item.description: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

item.title: calcom/cal.com
item.description: Scheduling infrastructure for absolutely everyone.

item.title: onyx-dot-app/onyx
item.description: Open Source AI Platform - AI Chat with advanced features that works with every LLM

item.title: linkwarden/linkwarden
item.description: ⚡️⚡️⚡️ Self-hosted collaborative bookmark manager to collect, read, annotate, and fully preserve what matters, all in one place.

item.title: stack-auth/stack-auth
item.description: Open-source Auth0/Clerk alternative

item.title: supabase/supabase
item.description: The Postgres development platform. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.

item.title: shadcn-ui/ui
item.description: A set of beautifully-designed, accessible components and a code distribution platform. Works with your favorite frameworks. Open Source. Open Code.

item.title: gitroomhq/postiz-app
item.description: 📨 The ultimate social media scheduling tool, with a bunch of AI 🤖

item.title: AykutSarac/jsoncrack.com
item.description: ✨ Innovative and open-source visualization application that transforms various data formats, such as JSON, YAML, XML and CSV into interactive graphs.

item.title: karakeep-app/karakeep
item.description: A self-hostable bookmark-everything app (links, notes and images) with AI-based automatic tagging and full text search

item.title: ridafkih/keeper.sh
item.description: Open-source calendar sync tool & universal calendar MCP server. Aggregate, sync and control calendars on Google, Outlook, Office 365, iCloud, CalDAV or ICS.

item.title: blinkospace/blinko
item.description: An open-source, self-hosted personal AI note tool prioritizing privacy, built using TypeScript .

item.title: kyantech/Palmr
item.description: 🌴 Palmr. is an open-source file-sharing platform focused on privacy and security. It enables users to upload, manage, and share files with features like password protection, custom links, and access control without tracking or limitations. Designed for seamless and secure sharing, Palmr. is completely free.

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

item.title: mfts/papermark
item.description: Papermark is the open-source DocSend alternative with built-in analytics and custom domains.

item.title: vercel/chatbot
item.description: A full-featured, hackable Next.js AI chatbot built by Vercel

item.title: typicode/mistcss
item.description: Create visual components for React without JavaScript or TypeScript. Leverage native HTML and CSS. It’s an alternative to CSS-in-JS and CSS modules.

item.title: bulwarkmail/webmail
item.description: Webmail built for the 21st Century. A modern, self-hosted email client for Stalwart Mail Server powered by the JMAP protocol. Email, calendar, contacts and files. Fast, private, and open source.

item.title: lukevella/rallly
item.description: Rallly is an open-source scheduling and collaboration tool designed to make organizing events and meetings easier.

item.title: spliit-app/spliit
item.description: Free and Open Source Alternative to Splitwise. Share expenses with your friends and family.

item.title: refinedev/refine
item.description: A React Framework for building internal tools, admin panels, dashboards & B2B apps with unmatched flexibility.

item.title: kurrier-org/kurrier
item.description: Kurrier is a modern, self-hosted workspace for email, calendar, contacts and storage.

item.title: herol3oy/austen
item.description: 📚 discover story relationships

item.title: louisgv/local.ai
item.description: 🎒 local.ai - Run AI locally on your PC!

item.title: gummipunkt/signalcow
item.description: This project provides a web-based platform to manage and interact with a Signal bot. It allows users to register, create groups that correspond to Signal groups, and configure webhooks to send messages to these groups via a REST API.

item.title: necdetsanli/do-not-ghost-me
item.description: Anonymous reports and stats about recruitment ghosting. Next.js + PostgreSQL, privacy-first and open source.
